task: P4-02 — PIT-Safe Cross-Table Data Foundation Expansion

Stock.pit_safety_notes: Reference table. Not time-series. PIT-safe as of any date assuming no survivorship issue.
Stock.blockers: 274 stocks have no industry code (20.2%); 223 ETF heuristic via id LIKE '00%'

details.industry_support: 33 distinct codes mapped to sector groups via heuristic — sufficient for P4-03 sector grouping

StockQuote.pit_safety_notes: PIT_SAFE. All dates ISO. Use WHERE date <= asof_date for lookback. Do not use data after asof_date.
StockQuote.blockers: ~1355 rows with date=1970-12-04 (ETF epoch anomaly, pre-existing); affects effective min_date

MarketIndex.pit_safety_notes: PIT_SAFE. Join with StockQuote on date. If date missing in MarketIndex, fallback null — do not forward-fill future data.
MarketIndex.blockers: None for P4-03. TAIEX 766 days > 500d requirement.

InstitutionalChip.pit_safety_notes: PIT_SAFE_WITH_ASOF_LAG. Chip data available T+0 or T+1 (TWSE releases next morning). Use date <= asof_date with T+1 lag rule.
InstitutionalChip.blockers: Only 236 distinct trading days (~1 year). P4-04 requires >=500. Chip backfill blocked by missing twstock module. PROTOTYPE_ONLY.
InstitutionalChip.note: foreignBuy / trustBuy / dealerBuy are NET values (can be negative). totalBuy appears to be a separate aggregate.

MonthlyRevenue.pit_safety_notes: NOT_PIT_SAFE without asof lag. Schema has no announcement date. Must apply conservative lag: next_month + 15 days. E.g. 2026-03 revenue is available asof 2026-04-15 (conservative approximation).
MonthlyRevenue.blockers: Only 2026 data (2 months). Historical revenue trends need 12+ months. LIMITED_COVERAGE + INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY.
MonthlyRevenue.asof_lag_rule: conservative: year/month data available on (year, month+1, 15) i.e. ~45 days after month end

FinancialReport.pit_safety_notes: NOT_PIT_SAFE without asof lag. Schema has no announcement date. Conservative lag: Q1 available May 15, Q2 available Aug 14, Q3 available Nov 14, Q4 available Mar 31 of next year.
FinancialReport.blockers: Only 2025-Q4 data (1 quarter). Needs 8+ quarters for trend analysis. LIMITED_COVERAGE + INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY.
FinancialReport.asof_lag_rule: conservative: Q4 available March 31 next year; Q1 May 15; Q2 Aug 14; Q3 Nov 14

StockMetrics.pit_safety_notes: PIT_SAFE for available dates. Only 1 effective trading day of data (2026-03-27 only, effectively). PROTOTYPE_ONLY.
StockMetrics.blockers: Effectively only 1 trading day of data. Cannot compute PE/PB trends. INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY.

WalkForwardResult.pit_safety_notes: DEPRECATED. All 6 signal types belong to H001-H012 (all retired 2026-05-05). Do not use for P4 analysis.
WalkForwardResult.blockers: H001-H012 retired. Must redesign T-05 as portfolio walk-forward. DO NOT USE.

JobRunLog.pit_safety_notes: Operational log. Not used as feature source.
JobRunLog.blockers: Not a data source — operational log only

SyncLog.pit_safety_notes: Operational log. Not used as feature source.
SyncLog.blockers: Not a data source — operational log only

stockquote_institutionalchip_stock_overl.note: All stocks have chip data but only 236 trading days depth
